top3.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id 
    FROM bond 
    WHERE bond_type = 'single'
) s ON a.molecule_id = s.molecule_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
WHERE a.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id 
    FROM bond b 
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
);

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';

SELECT 
    ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS FLOAT) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT molecule_id 
    FROM bond 
    WHERE bond_type = 'single'
) s ON a.molecule_id = s.molecule_id;

SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
WHERE a.molecule_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT b.molecule_id 
    FROM bond b 
    WHERE b.bond_type = 'single'
);

final.sql:
SELECT 
    CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN a.element = 'Cl' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(*) AS chlorine_percentage
FROM atom a
JOIN bond b ON a.molecule_id = b.molecule_id
WHERE b.bond_type = 'single';
